Meaning.Vi: Bắt, tóm, bắt gặp (động tác nắm giữ hoặc ngăn chặn ai đó đang làm điều gì đó)
Meaning.En: To take hold of suddenly or forcibly; to capture or seize, especially unexpectedly.
Meaning.Example: The police caught the thief red-handed.

Situation.Vi: Cảnh sát bắt quả tang tên trộm đang ăn trộm.
Situation.En: Police caught the thief in the act of stealing.

Situation.Vi: Con trai tôi bị mẹ bắt đang xem TV thay vì học bài.
Situation.En: My son was caught watching TV instead of studying.

Meaning.Vi: Bị mắc kẹt, bị ảnh hưởng bởi (điều không mong muốn)
Meaning.En: To become involved or affected by something, especially something undesirable.
Meaning.Example: We got caught in a heavy rainstorm on the way home.

Situation.Vi: Bị kẹt trong giao thông giờ cao điểm.
Situation.En: We were caught in rush-hour traffic and arrived late.

Situation.Vi: Bị mưa bất ngờ khi đang đi dạo.
Situation.En: We were caught in a sudden downpour while walking.

Meaning.Vi: Bị lây (bệnh), bị trúng (vi-rút, vi khuẩn)
Meaning.En: To become infected or affected by a disease or virus.
Meaning.Example: He caught a cold after walking home in the snow.

Situation.Vi: Bị cảm lạnh sau khi bơi trong nước lạnh.
Situation.En: She caught a cold after swimming in the cold lake.
